mistral-7b.name: Mistral-7B-Instruct
mistral-7b.description: A compact 7B instruction-tuned general-purpose language model. It is relatively low cost and suitable for concise instruction following, factual question answering, and lightweight reasoning, but may be less reliable on difficult multi-step reasoning than larger models.

qwen2.5-7b.name: Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct
qwen2.5-7b.description: A compact 7B instruction-tuned general-purpose model from the Qwen2.5 family. It is cost-efficient and often strong for mathematics, multilingual text, instruction following, and structured reasoning relative to its size.

llama3.1-8b.name: Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
llama3.1-8b.description: An 8B instruction-tuned general-purpose model from the Llama 3.1 family. It provides a low-to-moderate cost option for general QA, summarization-style responses, and instruction following, with limited capacity compared with larger models.

qwen2.5-14b.name: Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
qwen2.5-14b.description: A mid-sized 14B instruction-tuned model from the Qwen2.5 family. It balances cost and quality and is suitable for mathematical reasoning, question answering, and general instruction following when 7B models may be insufficient.

yi-34b.name: Yi-34B-Chat
yi-34b.description: A 34B chat-oriented general-purpose model. It is more capable but more expensive than compact 7B and 14B models, and is intended for harder instruction-following, reasoning, and question-answering cases where stronger language understanding is useful.

codellama-34b.name: CodeLlama-34B-Instruct
codellama-34b.description: A 34B instruction-tuned model specialized for code generation and code reasoning. It can handle programming-oriented prompts well, but may be less optimal than general-purpose chat models for ordinary factual QA, math word problems, or instruction-following tasks unrelated to code.

mixtral-8x7b.name: Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct
mixtral-8x7b.description: A sparse mixture-of-experts instruction-tuned model with 8 experts of 7B parameters. It is a strong general-purpose option with higher capacity than dense small models and can perform well on reasoning, QA, and instruction-following while maintaining efficient sparse activation.

llama3.1-70b.name: Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct
llama3.1-70b.description: A large 70B instruction-tuned general-purpose model. It is expected to be stronger on complex reasoning, multi-hop QA, and instruction following than smaller Llama models, but has substantially higher inference cost.

qwen2.5-72b.name: Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct
qwen2.5-72b.description: A large 72B instruction-tuned general-purpose model from the Qwen2.5 family. It is a high-quality but high-cost option for difficult reasoning, mathematics, QA, and instruction-following tasks where smaller models may fail.
